name: Server operations use access control
instruction: Server functions, views, and endpoints that call payload operations (payload.find, payload.create, payload.update, payload.delete, payload.findByID, payload.count) must pass overrideAccess: false and user to each call.
relevant_when: TypeScript or TSX file under packages/next/ or packages/ui/ or packages/payload/ that contains a payload.find, payload.create, payload.update, payload.delete, payload.findByID, or payload.count call inside a server function, view, endpoint, or route handler (not inside a test file, migration, or seed script).
context: Without overrideAccess: false, payload operations run with full admin access, bypassing all access control. This is a security vulnerability when the operation runs on behalf of a user request.
scope_reason: A single file contains the payload operation call and its arguments.

checklist.name: override-access-false
checklist.rule: Every payload operation call (payload.find, payload.create, payload.update, payload.delete, payload.findByID, payload.count) in a server function, view, or endpoint passes overrideAccess: false.

checklist.name: user-passed
checklist.rule: Every payload operation call that sets overrideAccess: false also passes a user property.
